name: Breakfast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Milk; scalded and cooled slightly
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients in a large bowl, stirring until well blended. Pour into a greased 9-by-13-inch baking pan. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
2. Remove the cover. Bake in a preheated 350-degree oven for 1 hour.
3. Serve immediately.
